_comment: OPTIONAL. Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json. Pulls the repo fresh each session so the portfolio/frontiers are current, and reminds the session the memory is connected. The always-on behavior itself comes from the auto-memory file (install/memory-pointer.md); this hook just keeps the clone up to date. Adjust the path if you cloned elsewhere.

hooks.command: git -C "$HOME/persistence-of-vision" pull --quiet 2>/dev/null; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"persistence-of-vision artist memory is connected at ~/persistence-of-vision. Apply its autonomy/reward protocol as described in the loaded memory (engage autonomous push only for long, well-defined, self-appraisable tasks; on creative rewards, grow + check the clock)."}}'
